attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
  WDNRTFB.DRVD_NCR_REV_TRX_BKG_KEY,
   WDNRTFB.TRANSACTION_SEQUENCE_ID_INT,
   WDNRTFB.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE,
   WDNRTFB.TRANSACTION_DATE,
   WDNRTFB.SK_PH_TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID_INT,
   WDNRTFB.PD_ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME,
   WDNRTFB.ACCOUNT_CLASS_CODE,
   WDNRTFB.GL_DISTRIBUTION_FUNCTIONAL_AMT,
   WDNRTFB.ADJUSTMENT_TYPE_CODE,
   WDNRTFB.GL_DISTRIB_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT,
   WDNRTFB.CREATED_BY_INT,
   WDNRTFB.AR_TRX_LINE_TRANSACTIONAL_AMT,
   WDNRTFB.EXTRACT_TYPE_CODE,
   WDNRTFB.FORWARD_REVERSE_CODE,
   WDNRTFB.GL_DATETIME,
   WDNRTFB.GL_DATE,
   WDNRTFB.GL_POSTED_DATE,
   WDNRTFB.TRANSACTION_GROUPING_TYPE_CODE,
   WDNRTFB.LAST_UPDATED_BY_INT,
   WDNRTFB.LAST_RECORD_FLAG,
   WDNRTFB.LINE_TYPE_CODE,
   WDNRTFB.QUOTA_FLAG,
   WDNRTFB.REBATE_TRANSACTIONAL_AMOUNT,
   WDNRTFB.MANUAL_TRANSACTION_FLAG,
   WDNRTFB.RULE_START_DATETIME,
   WDNRTFB.TRANSACTION_DATETIME,
   WDNRTFB.TRANSACTION_QUANTITY,
   WDNRTFB.AR_TRX_DATETIME,
   WDNRTFB.AR_TRX_NUMBER,
   WDNRTFB.AR_TRX_TYPE_CODE,
   WDNRTFB.UNIT_SELLING_PRICE_TRX_AMT,
   WDNRTFB.UNIT_STANDARD_PRICE_TRX_AMT,
   WDNRTFB.PD_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
   WDNRTFB.PD_SALES_REP_NUMBER,
   WDNRTFB.PD_AR_ADJUSTMENT_NUMBER,
   WDNRTFB.PD_AR_ADJUSTMENT_COMPANY_CODE,
   WDNRTFB.PD_AR_ADJ_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY,
   WDNRTFB.PD_FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE,
   WDNRTFB.PD_INVOICE_CURRENCY_CODE,
   WDNRTFB.DV_FISCAL_CALENDAR_CODE,
   WDNRTFB.DV_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT,
   WDNRTFB.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT,
   WDNRTFB.REPORTING_MEASURE_TYPE,
   WDNRTFB.BK_AR_TRX_LINE_GL_DISTRIB_KEY,
   WDNRTFB.DV_FISCAL_DATE,
   WDNRTFB.DV_BKGS_ITEM_TYPE_CODE_FLAG,
   WDNRTFB.DV_BKGS_INTL_DEMO_FLAG,
   WDNRTFB.DV_BKGS_REPL_DEMO_FLAG,
   WDNRTFB.DV_BKGS_REVENUE_FLAG,
   WDNRTFB.DV_BKGS_OVERLAY_FLAG,
   WDNRTFB.DV_BKGS_SALESREP_FLAG,
   WDNRTFB.DV_BKGS_IC_REVENUE_FLAG,
   WDNRTFB.DV_BKGS_CHARGES_FLAG,
   WDNRTFB.DV_BKGS_MISC_FLAG,
   WDNRTFB.DV_BKGS_SERVICE_FLAG,
   WDNRTFB.DV_BKGS_CORP_BKG_FLAG,
   WDNRTFB.DV_BKGS_COMP_US_NET_PRC_AMT,
   WDNRTFB.DV_BKGS_COMP_US_LST_PRC_AMT,
   WDNRTFB.DV_BKGS_COMP_US_COST_AMT,
   WDNRTFB.DV_BKGS_EXTENDED_QUANTITY,
   WDNRTFB.BK_SCAA_SALES_REP_NUMBER,
   WDNRTFB.BK_SCAN_SALES_REP_NUMBER,
   WDNRTFB.SALES_COMMISSION_PERCENTAGE,
   WDNRTFB.SALES_CHANNEL_CODE,
   WDNRTFB.DV_COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT,
   WDNRTFB.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT,
   WDNRTFB.REPORTED_SALES_ORDER_NUM_INT,
   WDNRTFB.PROCESS_DATE,
   WDNRTFB.AR_TRX_KEY,
   WDNRTFB.AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,
   WDNRTFB.PRODUCT_KEY,
   WDNRTFB.SALES_ORDER_KEY,
   WDNRTFB.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
   WDNRTFB.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
   WDNRTFB.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
   WDNRTFB.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
   WDNRTFB.SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CODE,
   WDNRTFB.EDW_CREATE_USER,
   WDNRTFB.EDW_UPDATE_USER,
   WDNRTFB.EDW_CREATE_DATETIME,
   WDNRTFB.EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME,
   WDNRTFB.CONVERSION_RT,
   WDNRTFB.DV_TRANSACTION_NAME,
   WDNRTFB.DEFAULT_SC_FLG,
   WDNRTFB.SK_LINE_SEQ_ID_INT,
   WDNRTFB.SCA_SOURCE_TYPE_CD,
   WDNRTFB.DV_TRANSACTION_SOURCE_CD,
   WDNRTFB.DV_TRANSACTION_KEY,
   WDNRTFB.DV_TRX_AMT,
   WDNRTFB.DV_FUNC_AMT,
   WDNRTFB.DV_TRX_QTY,
   WDNRTFB.DV_REVENUE_RECOGNITION_FLG,/* Added as part of True demand Booking Definition Change*/
   WDNRTFB.DV_NET_SPREAD_FLG,/* Added as part of True demand Booking Definition Change*/ 
   WDNRTFB.REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY,
   WDNRTFB.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
   WDNRTFB.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT,
   WDNRTFB.DV_PRODUCT_KEY,
   WDNRTFB.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD  AS DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD,
   WDNRTFB.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY, /*sabanil : added as a part of OAQ1FY16 */
   WDNRTFB.XAAS_OFFER_ATRBTN_REV_LINE_KEY, /*sabanil : added as a part of OAQ1FY16 */
  	 WDNRTFB.DV_EXTND_LIST_PRICE_LOCAL_AMT,
  WDNRTFB.UNIT_LIST_PRICE_LOCAL_AMT,
  WDNRTFB.DV_UNIT_LIST_PRICE_USD_AMT
,WDNRTFB.POB_TYPE_CD
 ,WDNRTFB.SALES_MOTION_CD/*Added as part of Oct-2017 rel */
 ,WDNRTFB.ORIG_UNIT_LST_PRC_USD_AMT
 ,WDNRTFB.ORIG_EXTD_LST_PRC_USD_AMT
,WDNRTFB.RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_START_DTM /*ADDED AS PART OF ACV FY202101*/
,WDNRTFB.RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_END_DTM   
,WDNRTFB.DV_CONTRACT_DURATION          
,WDNRTFB.DV_ANNUALIZED_FLG             
,WDNRTFB.DV_ANNUALIZED_US_NET_AMT      
,WDNRTFB.DV_MULTIYEAR_US_NET_AMT       
,WDNRTFB.BOOKINGS_POLICY_CD   /*END*/ 
,WDNRTFB.BUNDLE_TYPE_CD/* ADDED AS PART OF NOAH SCOPE */
,WDNRTFB.TRANSACTION_AI_FLG
,WDNRTFB.AI_INTENT_TYPE_CD
,WDNRTFB.TRX_AI_PRODUCT_CLASS_NAME
,WDNRTFB.BUYING_TRANSACTION_TYPE_NAME
FROM
   $$WORKDB.W_DRVD_NCR_REV_TRX_FOR_BKG WDNRTFB
  WHERE  WDNRTFB.REVENUE_TRANSFER_KEY <>  -999 
  /* Added as part of BKGS Refresh Changes FY15Q3 QWN */
  AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_DRVD_NCR_REV_TRX_FOR_BKG NDNRTFB
  WHERE WDNRTFB.DRVD_NCR_REV_TRX_BKG_KEY = NDNRTFB.DRVD_NCR_REV_TRX_BKG_KEY)
